string.name: permission_internet_reason
string.value: Used to connect to paired EggClip devices on the local network

string.name: permission_network_info_reason
string.value: Used to check network status and discover EggClip services on the local network

string.name: ui_message_unknown
string.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

string.name: ui_pairing_initial
string.value: Paste a desktop pairing invitation to validate it.

string.name: ui_pairing_input_updated
string.value: Input updated. Validate the invitation to continue.

string.name: ui_pairing_paste_imported
string.value: Invitation pasted and ready for validation.

string.name: ui_pairing_valid_required
string.value: Import and validate an invitation before pairing.

string.name: ui_pairing_code_matched
string.value: Confirmation code matched. Sensitive invitation data was cleared.

string.name: ui_pairing_completed
string.value: Pairing completed over an authenticated connection.

string.name: ui_pairing_invitation_valid
string.value: Invitation is valid. Compare the confirmation code.

string.name: ui_pairing_invitation_invalid
string.value: The pairing invitation is invalid or expired.

string.name: ui_history_delete_failed
string.value: Could not delete the history item.

string.name: ui_history_broadcast_allowed
string.value: The sync policy allows sending to the desktop.

string.name: ui_history_broadcast_paused
string.value: Text and local history were updated, but automatic sync is off.

string.name: ui_trusted_device_missing
string.value: The trusted device is missing or revoked.

string.name: ui_trusted_key_cleanup_failed
string.value: The device was revoked, but old local keys could not be fully removed.

string.name: ui_clipboard_read_failed
string.value: Could not read the clipboard. Use the system PasteButton authorization.

string.name: ui_clipboard_not_plain_text
string.value: The clipboard does not contain plain text.

string.name: ui_clipboard_too_large
string.value: Text is %d bytes; the limit is %d bytes.

string.name: ui_clipboard_write_failed
string.value: Could not write to the local clipboard.

string.name: ui_scan_empty
string.value: The QR result is empty. Scan the desktop code again.

string.name: ui_scan_success
string.value: QR code scanned and ready for validation.

string.name: ui_scan_failed
string.value: Scanning did not finish. Check camera permission and try again.

string.name: ui_connection_waiting_description
string.value: Import an invitation and compare the code before connecting.

string.name: ui_connection_authenticated_description
string.value: The secure session is already online.

string.name: ui_connection_failed_description
string.value: Check the local network, pairing state, and try again.

string.name: ui_connection_context_failed_description
string.value: The app context required for HUKS and RDB is unavailable.

string.name: ui_connection_endpoint_invalid_description
string.value: Choose a local IPv4 address and a port from 1 to 65535.

string.name: ui_connection_material_failed_description
string.value: Local identity or ephemeral handshake material is unavailable.

string.name: ui_connection_handshake_sent_description
string.value: Waiting for the desktop identity proof.

string.name: ui_connection_identity_verified_description
string.value: Waiting for the desktop to complete authentication.

string.name: ui_connection_saved_description
string.value: Trusted-device and sync-space records are stored locally.

string.name: ui_connection_sync_ready_description
string.value: The authenticated connection can now sync plain text in both directions.

string.name: ui_connection_stopped_description
string.value: Import an invitation or connect again when ready.

string.name: ui_connection_revoked_description
string.value: Trusted reconnect stopped. Create a new invitation to pair again.

string.name: ui_connection_sync_init_failed_title
string.value: Secure session online; sync initialization failed

string.name: ui_connection_sync_init_failed_description
string.value: Live sync will retry after reconnection.

string.name: ui_connection_received_description
string.value: The item was encrypted into recent history and is ready to copy.

string.name: ui_connection_receive_duplicate_description
string.value: The item already exists in local history.

string.name: ui_connection_receive_paused_description
string.value: The desktop live item was ignored by the current sync policy.

string.name: ui_outbound_none
string.value: No local items are waiting to be sent.

string.name: ui_outbound_read_failed
string.value: Could not read pending sync state; local history is preserved.

string.name: ui_outbound_confirmed
string.value: All local sync items were confirmed by the desktop.

string.name: ui_outbound_pending
string.value: %d local items are waiting for desktop confirmation.

string.name: ui_outbound_queued
string.value: %d local items will be sent after reconnection.

string.name: ui_discovery_waiting
string.value: Waiting to start local network discovery.

string.name: ui_discovery_found
string.value: %d candidate addresses found. Discovery does not establish trust.

string.name: ui_poc_transport_idle
string.value: Enter a desktop IP address and port to connect manually.

string.name: ui_poc_connected
string.value: Connected to %s. This experimental connection is not authenticated.

string.name: ui_poc_failed
string.value: Could not connect to the desktop. Check the address, firewall, and network.

string.name: ui_poc_recent_missing
string.value: No recent successful address is available.

string.name: ui_poc_background
string.value: Disconnected in the background; the app will reconnect in the foreground.

string.name: home_unpaired_description
string.value: Open Devices and scan a QR code or paste a desktop invitation.

string.name: home_background_paused
string.value: Trusted connections pause in the background and resume automatically in the foreground.

string.name: home_paste_help
string.value: Tap the system PasteButton to read and send once.

string.name: home_delete_dialog_message
string.value: This removes only EggClip local history and does not change the system clipboard.

string.name: home_clear_dialog_message
string.value: All EggClip history will be removed. The system clipboard is not affected.

string.name: pairing_paste_help
string.value: Scan a QR code or use the system PasteButton to read an invitation from the clipboard.

string.name: paste_authorization_failed
string.value: PasteButton authorization failed. The system clipboard was not read.

string.name: pairing_authenticated_notice
string.value: An authenticated connection already exists. Stop it before using this new invitation.

string.name: pairing_invitation_cleared_notice
string.value: The invitation was removed from the input field. Continue to finish pairing.

string.name: pairing_vpn_address_notice
string.value: If the computer uses a VPN or multiple networks, select the address on the current local network.

string.name: pairing_invitation_safety
string.value: Invitations can be used once, expire after 5 minutes, and are never saved to clipboard history.

string.name: devices_getting_started_intro
string.value: EggClip works with the Windows desktop app. First-time setup takes about two minutes.

string.name: devices_step_launch_desc
string.value: Open EggClip on the computer and keep it running.

string.name: devices_step_network_desc
string.value: Connect the computer and HarmonyOS device to the same Wi-Fi or another mutually reachable local network.

string.name: devices_step_invite_desc
string.value: Create an invitation QR code or text from the desktop Devices page.

string.name: devices_step_pair_desc
string.value: Tap Start pairing, import the invitation, and compare the confirmation code on both devices.

string.name: devices_diagnostics_expanded
string.value: Connection diagnostics are expanded under Connection issues. If discovery fails, check the firewall or enter the desktop address manually.

string.name: devices_invitation_security
string.value: Invitations expire after 5 minutes and work once. Sync starts only after confirmation-code comparison and secure authentication.

string.name: devices_feature_receive_desc
string.value: Copy text on the computer and the authenticated connection shows it on the HarmonyOS Home page.

string.name: devices_feature_send_desc
string.value: Use the system PasteButton on Home to authorize one read, then send the text for direct pasting on the computer.

string.name: devices_feature_reconnect_desc
string.value: When the desktop app is running and this app returns to the foreground, saved trusted-device information reconnects automatically.

string.name: devices_privacy_lan_desc
string.value: No account, central server, or public relay is used. Text is sent only to paired devices.

string.name: devices_privacy_local_desc
string.value: History stays on this device and can be disabled or cleared from Settings.

string.name: devices_privacy_system_desc
string.value: Device private keys and sync-space keys are protected by secure system storage. Normal logs never contain clipboard text.

string.name: devices_add_device_desc
string.value: Scan or paste a desktop invitation.

string.name: devices_auto_connect_desc
string.value: Paired devices connect automatically while the app is in the foreground.

string.name: devices_connection_issues_desc
string.value: If automatic connection fails, rediscover the desktop or enter its address manually.

string.name: devices_runtime_notice
string.value: A temporary connection only proves that a network channel is available. A device appears as trusted only after pairing and authentication.

string.name: devices_discovery_empty
string.value: No desktop found. If VPN/TUN, virtual networking, or the firewall affects the emulator, use manual connection below.

string.name: devices_manual_desc
string.value: When discovery is unavailable, enter the IP and port shown by the desktop app. After connection, Home PasteButton sends through this channel.

string.name: devices_troubleshoot_discovery_empty
string.value: If no candidates appear, mDNS may be blocked by VPN, emulator networking, the router, or the firewall.

string.name: devices_troubleshoot_manual_desc
string.value: Open Local network diagnostics in desktop Settings, then enter the normal adapter IPv4 address and port above.

string.name: devices_troubleshoot_vpn_desc
string.value: An emulator may need VPN TUN to reach the host local network. A physical device should normally use the same Wi-Fi.

string.name: devices_troubleshoot_security_desc
string.value: A discovered address is not trusted. Formal sync still requires pairing and authentication.

string.name: devices_empty_trusted
string.value: No trusted devices yet. Tap Add device below to pair.

string.name: devices_remove_message
string.value: This stops automatic reconnect, revokes local trust, and clears old local sync-space keys and history. Also remove this device on the desktop to rotate the space key. Pair again before future use.

string.name: devices_rule_limit_desc
string.value: v1 recommends a small sync space to reduce conflicts and accidental connections.

string.name: devices_rule_pair_desc
string.value: mDNS discovers addresses only and never establishes trust.

string.name: devices_rule_rotate_desc
string.value: Removing a device revokes it and starts the sync-space key rotation flow.

string.name: settings_language_restart_message
string.value: Restart now to apply the selected language to every page and system label.

string.name: settings_language_reopen_hint
string.value: Language saved. To apply it later, force-stop EggClip in system settings, then reopen it.

string.name: settings_language_save_failed
string.value: Could not save the language preference.

string.name: settings_privacy_intro
string.value: No account, central server, public relay, ads, or analytics.

string.name: settings_privacy_clipboard_desc
string.value: The clipboard is read once only after you tap the system PasteButton. Received text is copied manually.

string.name: settings_privacy_local_desc
string.value: Encrypted history, settings, device identity, trust state, and recent addresses stay on this device.

string.name: settings_privacy_lan_desc
string.value: Text is sent only to paired devices using application-layer encryption.

string.name: settings_privacy_keys_desc
string.value: Device private keys and sync-space keys are protected by secure system storage. The database stores references only.

string.name: settings_privacy_control_desc
string.value: You can disable or clear history, remove trusted devices, or reinitialize pairing security.

string.name: settings_privacy_full
string.value: The full privacy policy is available on the AppGallery app details page.

string.name: settings_reinitialize_notice
string.value: Use only when keys are damaged. Reinitializing removes local pairing, sync spaces, and history, then requires pairing again.

string.name: settings_reinitialize_dialog_message
string.value: This disconnects the current session and removes local sync-space keys, trusted devices, and clipboard history. App settings and the long-term local identity remain. Pair again afterward.

string.name: settings_save_history_desc
string.value: Keep recent items on this device

string.name: home_copy_initial
string.value: Desktop text can be copied manually

string.name: home_copy_ready
string.value: Desktop text received. Tap Copy to save it locally.

string.name: home_copy_write_failed
string.value: Could not write to the local clipboard. Try again.

string.name: home_history_copy_success
string.value: History text copied to the local clipboard

string.name: home_history_copy_unavailable
string.value: This history item has no text to copy

string.name: home_history_copy_failed
string.value: Could not copy the history item

string.name: home_outbound_initial_desc
string.value: After PasteButton authorization, EggClip saves local history and sends according to your sync policy.

string.name: home_outbound_read_failed_title
string.value: Could not read pending sync state

string.name: home_outbound_policy_unavailable_desc
string.value: Local history is preserved, but settings could not be read, so nothing was sent.

string.name: home_outbound_paused_desc
string.value: The text is in local history, but the current policy blocks sending to the desktop.

string.name: home_outbound_waiting_connection_desc
string.value: The text is in local history. Connect a desktop and tap PasteButton again.

string.name: home_outbound_sent_desc
string.value: The text was sent to the desktop.

string.name: home_outbound_failed_desc
string.value: The connection closed. Local history is preserved.

string.name: home_outbound_retry_desc
string.value: Local history is preserved. Trigger sending again after the network recovers.

string.name: home_paste_not_connected
string.value: Plain text read. Connect a desktop from Devices before sending.

string.name: home_paste_link_down
string.value: Send failed because the connection closed

string.name: home_paste_policy_failed
string.value: Could not read the sync policy; nothing was sent

string.name: home_empty_failed_help
string.value: %s: %s Open Devices to rediscover or connect with a manual IP address.

string.name: home_empty_paused_help
string.value: %s: %s Resume automatic receive to show desktop text here.

string.name: home_empty_help
string.value: Desktop text appears here. Tap Paste to send this device's clipboard.

string.name: home_history_disabled_help
string.value: Only live sync is active. Set history to 20, 50, or 100 items in Settings to save recent text.

string.name: home_history_empty_help
string.value: Recent items appear here after text is sent or received.

string.name: home_history_count
string.value: %d / %d items · History catch-up never overwrites the current clipboard

string.name: home_secure_sent_status
string.value: Sent through the authenticated encrypted session

string.name: home_secure_sent_desc
string.value: The text was saved securely and sent to the desktop.

string.name: home_secure_pending_status
string.value: Submitted to the secure session; waiting for desktop confirmation

string.name: home_secure_pending_desc
string.value: The text was saved securely and is waiting for desktop confirmation.

string.name: home_secure_queued_status
string.value: Network unavailable. Text queued for sync.

string.name: home_secure_queued_desc
string.value: The local item is safe. Trusted reconnect will resend it automatically through sync ranges.

string.name: home_secure_initializing_status
string.value: Sync is initializing. The text will send when ready.

string.name: home_secure_initializing_desc
string.value: The text is safe and will send automatically after initialization.

string.name: home_secure_paused_status
string.value: Text saved to local history; sync is paused

string.name: home_secure_paused_desc
string.value: The local item is saved, but the current policy blocks sending.

string.name: home_secure_failed_status
string.value: Secure sync failed; text was saved to local history

string.name: home_secure_failed_desc
string.value: The local item is preserved. Check the trusted device and HUKS space key.

string.name: home_history_context_failed
string.value: Page context unavailable; local history was not saved

string.name: home_history_unavailable_desc
string.value: Page context is unavailable, so nothing was sent.

string.name: home_history_confirming_desc
string.value: The local transaction must finish before sync policy is checked.

string.name: home_history_save_failed_desc
string.value: The local transaction was not confirmed, so sending stopped.

string.name: home_history_confirmed_desc
string.value: The local transaction finished. Checking sync policy.

string.name: home_history_count_only
string.value: Showing count only; history text is hidden

string.name: home_trusted_retry_failed_desc
string.value: Check that the desktop is running, Wi-Fi is connected, and Windows Firewall allows EggClip.

string.name: home_history_cleared
string.value: Local history cleared; the system clipboard was not changed

string.name: pairing_imported_clipboard
string.value: Invitation read and validated from clipboard

string.name: pairing_import_clipboard_failed
string.value: Could not read a plain-text invitation from the clipboard

string.name: pairing_confirm_selected
string.value: Codes match; connect to selected address

string.name: pairing_desc_authenticated
string.value: The authenticated session is established. No new pairing handshake is needed.

string.name: pairing_desc_compare
string.value: For first pairing, compare the six-digit code. Previously paired devices can restore a trusted connection below.

string.name: pairing_compare_required
string.value: Compare the six-digit code and confirm it matches before pairing

string.name: pairing_context_connect_failed
string.value: Cannot connect: page context is unavailable

string.name: pairing_connection_exception
string.value: Pairing failed. Check the desktop address, port, and invitation expiry.

string.name: pairing_context_reconnect_failed
string.value: Cannot restore the trusted connection: page context is unavailable

string.name: pairing_no_reconnect_target
string.value: No trusted desktop is available. Complete pairing first.

string.name: pairing_reconnect_exception
string.value: Trusted reconnect failed. Check the desktop address and network.

string.name: pairing_trusted_read_failed
string.value: Could not read trusted-device records. Restart the app and try again.

string.name: pairing_existing_connection
string.value: An authenticated connection is active. Stop it before pairing again.

string.name: pairing_scan_context_failed
string.value: Cannot open the scanner: page context is unavailable

string.name: pairing_imported_qr
string.value: Invitation read and validated from QR code

string.name: pairing_scan_import_failed
string.value: QR import failed. Copy and paste the invitation instead.

string.name: settings_context_failed
string.value: Page context unavailable. Settings cannot be used.

string.name: settings_history_clear_notice
string.value: Clearing history affects only EggClip history, not the system clipboard.

string.name: settings_self_test_intro
string.value: After pairing, test the HUKS space key and digest.

string.name: settings_self_test_privacy
string.value: The test uses fixed text and never reads or displays clipboard content.

string.name: settings_clear_service_unavailable
string.value: Settings service is unavailable; history was not cleared

string.name: settings_history_cleared
string.value: Local history cleared; the system clipboard was not affected

string.name: settings_self_test_unavailable
string.value: Settings service is unavailable; self-test cannot run

string.name: settings_self_test_running_desc
string.value: Using the saved space-key reference for fixed-text encryption, decryption, and HMAC verification.

string.name: settings_self_test_exception_desc
string.value: An unclassified error occurred. No key material was read or displayed.

string.name: settings_recovery_running_desc
string.value: Removing local HUKS space keys and pairing records.

string.name: settings_recovery_success_desc
string.value: Cleared %d HUKS space-key references and local pairing data. Pair again.

string.name: settings_recovery_success_invalid_desc
string.value: Cleared %d HUKS space-key references and local pairing data; ignored %d damaged references with no HUKS alias. Pair again.

string.name: settings_recovery_exception_desc
string.value: Recovery failed without generating or displaying key material. Restart the app and try again.

string.name: settings_recovery_read_failed
string.value: Could not read space-key references. The database was not changed.

string.name: settings_recovery_huks_failed
string.value: HUKS key removal failed at %s. Pairing data was not cleared; restart and try again.

string.name: settings_recovery_store_failed
string.value: HUKS keys were removed, but pairing data reset failed. Restart and run reinitialization again.

string.name: settings_recovery_incomplete
string.value: Reinitialization did not finish. Restart the app and try again.

string.name: settings_self_test_passed
string.value: HUKS space-key encryption and digest self-test passed

string.name: settings_self_test_no_key
string.value: No paired sync-space key reference found

string.name: settings_self_test_mismatch
string.value: HUKS space-key self-test result did not match

string.name: settings_self_test_store_failed
string.value: Could not read the sync-space key reference

string.name: settings_self_test_code_desc
string.value: Encryption, decryption, and HMAC passed. Cross-device confirmation code: %s. A desktop match confirms HMAC interoperability.

string.name: settings_self_test_passed_desc
string.value: Fixed-text encryption, decryption, and consistency checks passed. No key or full digest was displayed.

string.name: settings_self_test_pair_first
string.value: Pair with a desktop first so this device stores a sync-space key reference.

string.name: settings_self_test_mismatch_desc
string.value: Encryption and decryption finished, but the result did not match the fixed test text.

string.name: settings_self_test_hmac_stage
string.value: Digest failed at stage: %s. Pair again and retry.

string.name: settings_self_test_store_desc
string.value: Could not read the local sync-space record. Check the database or pair again.

string.name: settings_self_test_safe_failure
string.value: Self-test failed without reading or displaying key material.

string.name: devices_recent_endpoint_meta
string.value: %s · %s · A network address does not establish device trust

string.name: devices_rename_retry
string.value: Could not rename the device. Try again.

string.name: devices_remove_incomplete
string.value: Device removal is incomplete. Reinitialize pairing security in Settings.

string.name: devices_removed
string.value: Device removed. Old local space keys and history were cleared; remove this device on the desktop too.

string.name: devices_remove_failed
string.value: Could not remove the device. Reinitialize pairing security in Settings.

string.name: devices_runtime_online_desc
string.value: The network channel is open. Return Home and use the system PasteButton to send text.

string.name: devices_runtime_failed_desc
string.value: No trusted-device record is available. Follow troubleshooting and retry the manual connection.

string.name: devices_runtime_waiting_desc
string.value: After formal pairing, trusted-device status, fingerprint, and last-online time appear here.

string.name: devices_hint_connected
string.value: WebSocket is connected. Return Home and use PasteButton to send local clipboard text.

string.name: devices_hint_connection_failed
string.value: Check that the desktop is running, the port is correct, Windows Firewall allows EggClip, and both devices are on the same local network.

string.name: devices_hint_discovery_failed
string.value: If mDNS discovery fails, enter the desktop IPv4 address and port manually.

string.name: devices_hint_background
string.value: Discovery and connections stop in the background. Return to the foreground and discover again.

string.name: devices_hint_initial
string.value: Start desktop discovery. If no address appears, use the manual IP fallback.

string.name: devices_summary_candidates
string.value: %d desktops found; expand to choose one

string.name: devices_summary_failed
string.value: Discovery or connection failed; expand for troubleshooting
